channel.title: JooYoung Seo: a Learning Scientist for Inclusive Learning Ecologies on JooYoung Seo: a Learning Scientist for Inclusive Learning Ecologies
channel.description: Recent content in JooYoung Seo: a Learning Scientist for Inclusive Learning Ecologies on JooYoung Seo: a Learning Scientist for Inclusive Learning Ecologies

item.title: Initial Post
item.description:
Three Available Packages Specialized for Visually Impaired R Users

There are three packages for the blind R users (Godfrey, Warren, Murrell, Bilton, & Sorge, 2018; Seo, 2017; Siegert & Williams, 2017).

Methods

Creswell (2014) suggests a mixed methods study as a balanced methodology between qualitative and quantitative research.

Basic Histogram

See Figure ?? made by base R:

(x <- hist(airquality$Ozone, col='lightgreen'))
VI(x)
sonify(1:5, 1:5)

Ggplot

Will be added later soon.

References

Creswell, J. W. (2014). Research design: Qualitative, quantitative, and mixed methods approaches (4th ed.). Thousand Oaks, California: SAGE Publications.

Godfrey, A. J. R., Warren, D., Murrell, P., Bilton, T., & Sorge, V. (2018). BrailleR: Improved access for blind users. Retrieved from https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=BrailleR

Seo, J. (2017). TactileR: Converting an r graphical output into a braille ready-to-print pdf file for visually impaired r users optimized for swell form machine and braille embosser. Retrieved from https://github.com/sjystu/tactileR

Siegert, S., & Williams, R. (2017). Sonify: Data sonification - turning data into sound. Retrieved from https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=sonify

item.title: Accessibility, Making and Tactile Robotics: Facilitating Collaborative Learning and Computational Thinking for Learners with Visual Impairments
item.description: This work will be presented in the 13th International Conference of the Learning Sciences in London, UK.

item.title: Inclusive Makerspaces
item.description: Inclusive makerspaces is the primary project that JooYoung is currently focusing on.

item.title: The Intersections of Equity, Inclusivity and Accessibility in Game-Based Learning: Proposing a Tripartite Framework for Research and Design
item.description: This paper will be published in July, 2018 in British Journal of Educational Technology.

item.title: Embracing Learners with Visual Impairments in CSCL
item.description: This work has been presented in the 2017 International Conference on Computer-Supported Collaborative Learning in Philadelphia, US.

item.title: The Rapidly Changing World of Accessible Online Learning
item.description: This panel discussion has been presented in 2017 AECT in Florida.
